title: Fools In Their Fury

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: (A Modern Psalm of Rage)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: They swagger through steel canyons, proud and blind
Declaring with their sneers, "No God dwells here"
Their hearts are wastelands, minds to darkness resigned
While corruption flows like poison through their veins

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let them tremble before Your throne
When their temples turn to dust and stone
Justice breaks like thunder from above
While the faithful shelter in Your love
In Your love

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Look down, O Lord, from heaven's burning height
Upon these children who have lost their way
Their souls are rotted down to brittle bone
Their wisdom turned to ash and blown away

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let them tremble before Your throne
When their temples turn to dust and stone
Justice breaks like thunder from above
While the faithful shelter in Your love
In Your love

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Their throats are graves that swallow hope and light
Their tongues drip honey laced with deadly spite
They rush to shed the blood of righteous men
While peace remains a stranger to their gates

sections.label: Bridge
lines: But terror waits where they least expect to find
When judgment rains like fire from the sky
The fortress of their pride will fall behind
While those they mocked are lifted up on high

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let them tremble before Your throne
When their temples turn to dust and stone
Justice breaks like thunder from above
While the faithful shelter in Your love
In Your love
(In Your love)

sections.label: Outro
lines: O Lord, bring salvation from Your holy height
Let righteousness consume them like a flame
Till darkness yields before Your searing light
And every tongue confesses Your great name

epigraph: The fool hath said in his heart
